overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in futuristic armor exploring a dimly lit spaceship interior. The character moves through compact living quarters with metal walls and red emergency lighting, passing a bed and workout area before exiting into an industrial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact bedroom with metal bed and wall storage

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a metal bed frame toward a wall with storage compartments and a safe

entered.detail: simple metal bed with white pillows and dark bedding against the right wall
rectangular metal safe embedded in the wall with circular dial
wall-mounted grid storage compartment with multiple small drawers
vertical red light fixture casting red glow on the wall
long horizontal ceiling light fixture providing white illumination

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow bedroom with industrial metal walls. A bed with white pillows runs along the right side while red emergency lights cast a warm glow on the wall-mounted safe and storage rack ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: small training nook with exercise equipment

events.description: character turns from bedroom area into adjacent workout space with punching bag

agents.ego_description: moving past a hanging punching bag and exercise equipment toward a desk with a glowing red lamp

entered.detail: black heavy punching bag hanging from ceiling chain
round weight plates stacked on floor near wall
large green stability ball sitting against the wall
small wooden desk with various items on surface
articulated desk lamp emitting bright red light
open doorway leading to brightly lit industrial corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small workout area featuring a punching bag and exercise equipment. A wooden desk with a prominent red lamp sits against the right wall as the character approaches the exit doorway leading to the main corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial spaceship corridor with safety railings

events.description: character exits living quarters through doorway into main ship corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down a metal corridor with safety railings, approaching a secure door at the end

entered.detail: metal safety rail running along the left side of the corridor
heavy metal security door with warning stripes and hazard signage
circular industrial ventilation fan mounted on corridor wall
exposed pipes and conduits running along the ceiling and walls

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wider industrial corridor with metal railings and exposed piping. The camera follows as they approach a large security door at the end of the hallway, passing wall-mounted ventilation fans and overhead lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cramped confines of a private living space into a vast industrial corridor. It begins in a narrow bedroom with industrial metal walls, gliding past a bed with white pillows under the warm glow of red emergency lighting. As the character moves forward, the space shifts into a small workout area containing a punching bag and a wooden desk with a red lamp. The scene then opens as the character exits the room, emerging into a wider hallway defined by metal railings and exposed piping. Finally, the camera follows the character past wall-mounted ventilation fans toward a large security door at the end of the corridor.
